meaning: to transfer (a patient) to a different hospital; to transfer to hospit
sentence: 病情严重，医生建议他转院治疗。
pinyin: Bìngqíng yánzhòng, yīshēng jiànyì tā zhuǎn yuàn zhìliáo.
english: His condition was serious, so the doctor recommended transferring him to another hospital.

meaning: (slang) to hook up for sex; to arrange a casual sexual encounter (ofte
sentence: 他在交友软件上约炮，结果遇到了骗子。
pinyin: Tā zài jiāoyǒu ruǎnjiàn shàng yuē pào, jiéguǒ yùdào le piànzi.
english: He tried to hook up through a dating app and ended up meeting a scammer.

meaning: public; publicly (owned, financed, operated etc); run by the state
sentence: 这家公营医院的收费比较低。
pinyin: Zhè jiā gōng yíng yīyuàn de shōufèi bǐjiào dī.
english: This public hospital charges relatively lower fees.

sentence: 他在资格赛中表现出色，顺利晋级。
pinyin: Tā zài zī gé sài zhōng biǎoxiàn chūsè, shùnlì jìnjí.
english: He performed brilliantly in the qualifying round and advanced smoothly.

sentence: 古时候，进京师是很多人的梦想。
pinyin: Gǔ shíhou, jìn jīng shī shì hěn duō rén de mèngxiǎng.
english: In ancient times, going to the capital was the dream of many people.
